jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - 99acres - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? 99acres in Madurai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About 99acres:
99acres is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres!
